channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3707] replay-single 81b: rm remote dir failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Li Wei <liwei@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/72137446-fd65-11e2-b90c-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_81b failed with the following error:

rm remote dir failed

Info required for matching: replay-single 81b

== replay-single test 81b: DNE: unlink remote dir, drop MDT0 update reply, fail MDT0 == 01:34:31 (1375605271)
CMD: client-31vm3 lctl set_param fail_loc=0x1701
fail_loc=0x1701
Failing mds1 on client-31vm3
CMD: client-31vm3 grep -c /mnt/mds1' ' /proc/mounts
Stopping /mnt/mds1 (opts on client-31vm3
CMD: client-31vm3 umount -d /mnt/mds1
CMD: client-31vm3 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null && lctl dl | grep ' ST '
reboot facets: mds1
Failover mds1 to client-31vm3
01:34:49 (1375605289) waiting for client-31vm3 network 900 secs ...
01:34:49 (1375605289) network interface is UP
CMD: client-31vm3 hostname
mount facets: mds1
CMD: client-31vm3 test -b /dev/lvm-MDS/P1
Starting mds1: -o user_xattr,acl /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 /mnt/mds1
CMD: client-31vm3 mkdir -p /mnt/mds1; mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,acl /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 /mnt/mds1
CMD: client-31vm3 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh set_default_debug \"0x33f0404\" \" 0xffb7e3ff\" 32
CMD: client-31vm3 e2label /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-MDT0000
CMD: client-31vm5,client-31vm6.lab.whamcloud.com PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh wait_import_state_mount FULL mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid
client-31vm5: CMD: client-31vm5.lab.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n at_max
client-31vm6: CMD: client-31vm6.lab.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n at_max
rmdir: failed to remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d81/remote_dir': No such file or directory
client-31vm5: mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid in FULL state after 21 sec
client-31vm6: mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid in FULL state after 21 sec
replay-single test_81b: @@@@@@ FAIL: rm remote dir failed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Patch landed to master. Please let me know if any additional work is needed and I will reopen the ticket.
